scripts.dev:auth: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix auth-app/backend" "npm run dev --prefix auth-app/frontend"
scripts.dev:dashboard: concurrently "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix Dashboard/client"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix auth-app/backend" "npm run dev --prefix auth-app/frontend" "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix Dashboard/client" "npm run dev --prefix Admin"
scripts.build:total: npm run build --prefix Admin && npm run build --prefix Dashboard/client && npm run build --prefix auth-app/frontend
